drl:
rule "R0"
salience -10
when
    $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T2(-0.5));
    modify($p0_0) { setF2(true) }
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    T1(f2 != 11, $b1_0_0 : f3)
    T2($b1_1_0 : f0)
    T2(f0 != -1.0, f0 >= $b1_1_0)
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -6
when
    T2(f0 == 2.0, f0 != 0.0)
    T1(f3 == false, f0 != -3.0, $b2_1_0 : f3, $b2_1_1 : f3)
    $p2_2 : T1($b2_2_0 : f1, f3 == false)
then
    modify($p2_2) { setF3(true) }
end
rule "R3"
salience 1
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f1 > 2.0, f3 == false)
then
    insert(new T2(2.5));
    insert(new T2($p3_0.getF0()));
    $p3_0.setF3(true);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"

    $p4_0 : T1(f3 == false, $b4_0_0 : f0, f3 == false)

    $p4_0.setF1($b4_0_0);

    update($p4_0);
end
